analysis: Visuals: many sharp, clean handwritten digits with clear stylistic variety across stroke width, curvature, and topology; no obvious repetitive stroke templates or identical structure repeated. Metrics: low diversity (0.195) and low current entropy (0.118) but visible structural variation; high beta_effective (71.5) and positive beta slope indicate movement toward a more deterministic/ordered regime; mcmc_tau_int ~20 suggests reduced mixing; entropy trend is decreasing while gap trend and beta are increasing. Conclusion: samples are orderly and high-quality but mixing is moderate-to-poor, producing lower measured diversity despite multiple micro-modes present. Recommend improving sampling rather than declaring mode collapse.
